description.en-US: Milesight WS502 — LoRaWAN (Class A) sensor that monitors relay / dry-contact state and electrical current. Uplinks are channel-TLV frames on FPort 85. (Datasheet/user guide cover the WS50X series.)
description.pt-BR: Milesight WS502 — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) que monitora relé / contato seco e corrente elétrica. Os uplinks são quadros channel-TLV no FPort 85. (Datasheet/manual cobrem a série WS50X.)
